results.name: cycle-ody-filterland
results.description: The cycle of filterlands originally debuting with just the ally color pairs in Odyssey and eventually completed in the Fallout commander decks.

results.name: cycle-ody-restock-creature
results.description: A vertical cycle of creatures from Odyssey that restock.

results.name: cycle-ody-thought-beast
results.description: A vertical cycle of creatures from Odyssey that reduce your hand size.

results.name: cycle-ody-wincon-enchantment
results.description: The cycle of five alternate win condition enchantments from Odyssey block.

results.name: cycle-ody-x-of-the-y
results.description: A vertical cycle of token-producing sorceries with flashback from Odyssey.

results.name: cycle-plc-tsb-colorshift
results.description: These cards are colorshifted versions of various cards [reprinted in the Time Spiral Timeshifted set](https://scryfall.com/search?q=s%3Atsb+%28tsh+or+lch+or+gde+or+lso+or+ndb%29&order=color).
